name: Service Bus Tours
registry_source: BBB Business Profile (Service Bus Company, Inc., Yonkers NY) - shows incorporation 01/01/1961 and business start 01/01/1937; NY DOS entity not directly verified online. Related DiPaolo Yonkers entities (Service Transit Lines, Bus Services Corp, Service NY Tours, Serbusco) cited in 2017 NY tax/Westchester DA case.
notes: No SAFER record found under 'Service Bus Tours', 'Service Bus Co', 'Service Tours', 'Service Transit Lines', 'Serbusco', or 'Service New York Tours'. Company markets itself as 'NYS-DOT and ICC Licensed Carrier' on servicetours.com, suggesting it operates primarily as a NYSDOT-regulated intrastate charter/school carrier (NYSDOT regulates intrastate buses in NY) rather than FMCSA-registered interstate. Address 756 Nepperhan Ave Yonkers NY 10703 confirmed. Operates under names 'Service Bus Tours Inc' and 'Service Bus Co Inc' (also 845 Nepperhan listed). Owner Salvatore DiPaolo Sr. was charged in 2017 for tax evasion through related entities. Founding year cited as 1937 or 1939 in multiple sources.

name: Kelly's Transit
registry_source: PA Department of State Bureau of Corporations - Kelly Transit, Inc. company number 760321, Business Corporation incorporated 07/30/1982 (per pennsylvaniadb.com aggregator of PA DOS records). Company also holds PA Public Utility Commission group/party charter authority in York County.
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA record found under 'Kelly Transit', 'Kellys Transit', or 'Kelly Transit Inc'. Only similarly-named match (Kelly's Transportation Services Inc, USDOT 1453343) is based in Humble TX, not Dover PA - NOT the same company. Kelly Transit appears to operate as PA intrastate-only school bus carrier for students with special needs since 1978, under PA PUC authority and PennDOT Type II school vehicle regulation (intrastate PA school carriers do not require USDOT). Confirmed: 10 N Main St, Dover, PA 17315; ~80 drivers; 700+ students; service for Lincoln Intermediate Unit #12 and 25+ school districts in York and Adams counties. Founded 1978 per company website; corporation formed 07/30/1982.

name: Jennings Transportation
registry_source: PA Department of State (entity not directly verified online but multiple third-party records confirm active Pennsylvania corporation 'Jennings Transportation Corp' founded 1973). BBB profile open since 2018.
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA record found for 'Jennings Transportation Corp' at 129 Meyer Rd, Nazareth PA 18064. Other Jennings carriers in SAFER (JENNINGS BUS CO USDOT 1315568 in Canton PA, JENNINGS TRANSPORT INC USDOT 854888, JENNINGS TRANSPORT LLC USDOT 3231588, JENNINGS TRANSPORTATION USDOT 2237139 in Las Vegas NV, JENNINGS TRANSPORTATION SERVICES LLC USDOT 3328522 in McDonough GA) are all different companies in different locations. Jennings Transportation Corp operates as PA intrastate-only school bus contractor primarily for Nazareth Area School District (NASD); intrastate PA school carriers typically don't require USDOT. Confirmed: founded 1973 by Oliver & Evelyn Jennings; current owner Janet Jennings-Ochs; fleet of 66 school buses + 25 other school vehicles (~91 total); ~85 employees; received first hybrid school bus in PA (IC Corp plug-in unit); est. ~$4.3M annual revenue.

name: Bedford Charter Svc
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (entity not directly retrieved online; incorporation year 1970 confirmed via BBB business profile). Family-owned since 1957, incorporated 1969-1970.
notes: Strong, exact-name SAFER match. USDOT 2258632 confirmed at 11 Railroad Ave, Bedford MA 01730 (exact address match to target). MC-808155 active. 117 power units / 51 drivers - large fleet for tuck-in. Operates interstate, no current safety rating. Founded 1957 (per company website), incorporated 1969-1970 (BBB lists 01/01/1970). Owners William and Naomi Martines (president and clerk). Operates 6-bay garage with on-site maintenance, GPS-enabled fleet. Primary client: Bedford Public Schools.

name: D W Clark & Son
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (entity registration not directly retrieved online); D&B/business-directory sources cite establishment year 1974. Some sources note family operation 'since the 1950s'.
notes: Strong name and address match. USDOT 4019808 confirmed at 3010 State Rt 23, Franklin NJ 07416 (exact match to target). MC-1515894. 42 power units total (22 school buses 16+ passenger and 20 vans 1-8 passenger); 32 drivers. Active interstate carrier authorized for hire. Provides school bus and charter transportation in tri-state area; serves local NJ schools. Founded ~1974 per Dun & Bradstreet, though references suggest family-operated business since the 1950s. Robert E. Clark (Franklin NJ) obituary 2024 and Richard Clark obituary 2018 may relate to family ownership but not directly confirmed as officers.
